positive.literal: wide establishing shot, full scene composition, ground plane visible, environment

negative.literal: closeup, macro, cropped, people, characters, crowd

laneRules: scene is a WIDE establishing shot with a visible ground/floor plane and horizon — the space the action sits INSIDE, not a zoomed-in texture. The 14/14 toss failed on over-zoom + void floors.
scenes are UNPOPULATED (no people/characters) per current tags — the negative asserts it.

CANON LAW — DIEGETIC ART OBEYS WORLD GEOGRAPHY: starter-zone scenes NEVER include the Tower. The slot filler injects 'tower' into the NEGATIVE for any scene whose context tags include 'starter' or 'distant-from-tower'. In-world locations render what a person standing there would actually see.
